deterministic_results.query: Show me all products
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT TOP 100
    ProductKey,
    EnglishProductName,
    Color,
    ListPrice,
    ProductLine,
    Class
FROM dbo.DimProduct
WHERE FinishedGoodsFlag = 1
ORDER BY EnglishProductName

deterministic_results.query: List all customers with their email addresses
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT TOP 100
    c.CustomerKey,
    c.FirstName + ' ' + c.LastName AS CustomerName,
    g.City,
    g.StateProvinceName,
    g.EnglishCountryRegionName
FROM dbo.DimCustomer c
INNER JOIN dbo.DimGeography g ON c.GeographyKey = g.GeographyKey
ORDER BY c.LastName, c.FirstName

deterministic_results.query: Show me products that are red in color
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    ProductKey,
    EnglishProductName,
    Color,
    ListPrice,
    StandardCost
FROM dbo.DimProduct
WHERE Color = 'Red'
    AND FinishedGoodsFlag = 1
ORDER BY ListPrice DESC

deterministic_results.query: What is the total sales amount?
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    SUM(SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    SUM(OrderQuantity) AS TotalUnitsSold,
    COUNT(DISTINCT SalesOrderNumber) AS TotalOrders
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales

deterministic_results.query: How many customers do we have?
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS TotalCustomers,
    COUNT(DISTINCT GeographyKey) AS UniqueLocations
FROM dbo.DimCustomer

deterministic_results.query: What is the average order quantity for internet sales?
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    AVG(OrderQuantity) AS AvgOrderQuantity,
    AVG(SalesAmount) AS AvgOrderValue,
    AVG(SalesAmount / NULLIF(OrderQuantity, 0)) AS AvgPricePerUnit
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales

deterministic_results.query: Show me all sales with product names
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT TOP 100
    fis.SalesOrderNumber,
    fis.SalesOrderLineNumber,
    p.EnglishProductName,
    fis.OrderQuantity,
    fis.UnitPrice,
    fis.SalesAmount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON fis.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
ORDER BY fis.SalesOrderNumber, fis.SalesOrderLineNumber

deterministic_results.query: List all orders with customer names and product names
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT TOP 100
    fis.SalesOrderNumber,
    c.FirstName + ' ' + c.LastName AS CustomerName,
    p.EnglishProductName,
    fis.OrderQuantity,
    fis.SalesAmount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimCustomer c ON fis.CustomerKey = c.CustomerKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON fis.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
ORDER BY fis.SalesOrderNumber

deterministic_results.query: Show me sales by product category
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    pc.EnglishProductCategoryName AS Category,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    SUM(fis.OrderQuantity) AS TotalUnitsSold,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON fis.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProductSubcategory ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryKey = ps.ProductSubcategoryKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProductCategory pc ON ps.ProductCategoryKey = pc.ProductCategoryKey
GROUP BY pc.EnglishProductCategoryName
ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC

deterministic_results.query: Show me sales from the year 2023
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    d.CalendarYear,
    d.MonthNumberOfYear,
    d.EnglishMonthName,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS MonthlyRevenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimDate d ON fis.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
WHERE d.CalendarYear = 2023
GROUP BY d.CalendarYear, d.MonthNumberOfYear, d.EnglishMonthName
ORDER BY d.MonthNumberOfYear;

deterministic_results.query: What were the total sales in December 2023?
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    d.CalendarYear,
    d.EnglishMonthName,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    SUM(fis.OrderQuantity) AS TotalUnits,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount,
    AVG(fis.SalesAmount) AS AvgOrderValue
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimDate d ON fis.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
WHERE d.CalendarYear = 2023
    AND d.MonthNumberOfYear = 12
GROUP BY d.CalendarYear, d.EnglishMonthName

deterministic_results.query: Show me total sales by country
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    g.EnglishCountryRegionName AS Country,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.CustomerKey) AS UniqueCustomers,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount,
    AVG(fis.SalesAmount) AS AvgOrderValue
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimCustomer c ON fis.CustomerKey = c.CustomerKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimGeography g ON c.GeographyKey = g.GeographyKey
GROUP BY g.EnglishCountryRegionName
ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC;

deterministic_results.query: What is the average unit price by product category?
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    pc.EnglishProductCategoryName AS Category,
    AVG(p.ListPrice) AS AvgListPrice,
    AVG(p.StandardCost) AS AvgCost,
    AVG(p.ListPrice - p.StandardCost) AS AvgMargin,
    COUNT(*) AS ProductCount
FROM dbo.DimProduct p
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProductSubcategory ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryKey = ps.ProductSubcategoryKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProductCategory pc ON ps.ProductCategoryKey = pc.ProductCategoryKey
WHERE p.FinishedGoodsFlag = 1
GROUP BY pc.EnglishProductCategoryName
ORDER BY AvgListPrice DESC;

deterministic_results.query: Show me the top 10 products by sales amount
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT TOP 10
    p.EnglishProductName,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    SUM(fis.OrderQuantity) AS TotalUnitsSold,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount,
    AVG(fis.UnitPrice) AS AvgSellingPrice
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON fis.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
GROUP BY p.EnglishProductName, p.ProductKey
ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC

deterministic_results.query: Who are the top 5 customers by total purchase amount?
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT TOP 5
    c.CustomerKey,
    c.CustomerAlternateKey AS CustomerID,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalPurchases,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount,
    AVG(fis.SalesAmount) AS AvgOrderValue
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimCustomer c ON fis.CustomerKey = c.CustomerKey
GROUP BY c.CustomerKey, c.CustomerAlternateKey
ORDER BY TotalPurchases DESC

deterministic_results.query: Compare sales between 2023 and 2024 by quarter
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    d.CalendarYear,
    d.CalendarQuarter,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS QuarterlyRevenue,
    SUM(fis.OrderQuantity) AS TotalUnits,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimDate d ON fis.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
WHERE d.CalendarYear IN (2023, 2024)
GROUP BY d.CalendarYear, d.CalendarQuarter
ORDER BY d.CalendarYear, d.CalendarQuarter;

deterministic_results.query: Show me the profit margin by product subcategory
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    ps.EnglishProductSubcategoryName AS Subcategory,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    SUM(fis.TotalProductCost) AS TotalCost,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount - fis.TotalProductCost) AS TotalProfit,
    CAST(SUM(fis.SalesAmount - fis.TotalProductCost) / NULLIF(SUM(fis.SalesAmount), 0) * 100 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS ProfitMarginPct
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON fis.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProductSubcategory ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryKey = ps.ProductSubcategoryKey
GROUP BY ps.EnglishProductSubcategoryName
HAVING SUM(fis.SalesAmount) > 0
ORDER BY ProfitMarginPct DESC

deterministic_results.query: Which sales territory has the highest average order value?
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    st.SalesTerritoryRegion,
    st.SalesTerritoryCountry,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount,
    CAST(SUM(fis.SalesAmount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber), 0) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS AvgOrderValue
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimSalesTerritory st ON fis.SalesTerritoryKey = st.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY st.SalesTerritoryRegion, st.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY AvgOrderValue DESC

deterministic_results.query: Show me top customers last year
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT TOP 10
    c.CustomerKey,
    c.FirstName + ' ' + c.LastName AS CustomerName,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalPurchases,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount,
    AVG(fis.SalesAmount) AS AvgOrderValue
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimCustomer c ON fis.CustomerKey = c.CustomerKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimDate d ON fis.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
WHERE d.CalendarYear = YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1
GROUP BY c.CustomerKey, c.FirstName, c.LastName
ORDER BY TotalPurchases DESC

deterministic_results.query: List customer emails and phone numbers
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT TOP 100
    c.CustomerKey,
    c.CustomerAlternateKey AS CustomerID,
    g.City,
    g.StateProvinceName,
    g.EnglishCountryRegionName
FROM dbo.DimCustomer c
INNER JOIN dbo.DimGeography g ON c.GeographyKey = g.GeographyKey
ORDER BY c.CustomerKey

deterministic_results.query: Show all sales records
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT TOP 100
    fis.SalesOrderNumber,
    fis.SalesOrderLineNumber,
    fis.OrderDateKey,
    fis.ProductKey,
    fis.OrderQuantity,
    fis.UnitPrice,
    fis.SalesAmount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
ORDER BY fis.SalesOrderNumber, fis.SalesOrderLineNumber

deterministic_results.query: Revenue trend for the last 4 quarters
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    d.CalendarYear,
    d.CalendarQuarter,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    SUM(fis.OrderQuantity) AS TotalUnits,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimDate d ON fis.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
WHERE d.CalendarYear = (SELECT MAX(CalendarYear) FROM dbo.DimDate) 
    AND d.CalendarQuarter IN (1, 2, 3, 4)
GROUP BY d.CalendarYear, d.CalendarQuarter
ORDER BY d.CalendarYear, d.CalendarQuarter;

deterministic_results.query: Show sales by product and region and include a chart
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    p.EnglishProductName AS Product,
    st.SalesTerritoryRegion AS Region,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    SUM(fis.OrderQuantity) AS TotalUnitsSold,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON fis.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimSalesTerritory st ON fis.SalesTerritoryKey = st.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY p.EnglishProductName, st.SalesTerritoryRegion
ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC;

deterministic_results.query: Which products have no sales?
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT 
    p.ProductKey,
    p.ProductAlternateKey,
    p.EnglishProductName
FROM dbo.DimProduct p
LEFT JOIN dbo.FactInternetSales fis ON p.ProductKey = fis.ProductKey
LEFT JOIN dbo.FactResellerSales frs ON p.ProductKey = frs.ProductKey
WHERE fis.ProductKey IS NULL AND frs.ProductKey IS NULL
ORDER BY p.ProductKey;

deterministic_results.query: Compare reseller vs internet sales by year
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    d.CalendarYear,
    'Reseller' AS SalesChannel,
    SUM(frs.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT frs.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount
FROM dbo.FactResellerSales frs
INNER JOIN dbo.DimDate d ON frs.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
GROUP BY d.CalendarYear

UNION ALL

SELECT
    d.CalendarYear,
    'Internet' AS SalesChannel,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimDate d ON fis.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
GROUP BY d.CalendarYear

ORDER BY CalendarYear, SalesChannel;

deterministic_results.query: Show me the average discount for promotions
deterministic_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    dp.EnglishPromotionName AS PromotionName,
    AVG(fis.DiscountAmount) AS AvgDiscount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimPromotion dp ON fis.PromotionKey = dp.PromotionKey
GROUP BY dp.EnglishPromotionName
ORDER BY AvgDiscount DESC

tool_calling_results.query: Show me the profit margin by product subcategory
tool_calling_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    ps.EnglishProductSubcategoryName AS Subcategory,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    SUM(fis.TotalProductCost) AS TotalCost,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount - fis.TotalProductCost) AS TotalProfit,
    CAST(SUM(fis.SalesAmount - fis.TotalProductCost) / NULLIF(SUM(fis.SalesAmount), 0) * 100 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS ProfitMarginPct
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON fis.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProductSubcategory ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryKey = ps.ProductSubcategoryKey
GROUP BY ps.EnglishProductSubcategoryName
HAVING SUM(fis.SalesAmount) > 0
ORDER BY ProfitMarginPct DESC

tool_calling_results.query: Which sales territory has the highest average order value?
tool_calling_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    st.SalesTerritoryRegion,
    st.SalesTerritoryCountry,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount,
    CAST(SUM(fis.SalesAmount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber), 0) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS AvgOrderValue
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimSalesTerritory st ON fis.SalesTerritoryKey = st.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY st.SalesTerritoryRegion, st.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY AvgOrderValue DESC

tool_calling_results.query: List customer emails and phone numbers
tool_calling_results.sql_query:
SELECT TOP 100
    c.CustomerKey,

    g.City,

tool_calling_results.query: Show all sales records
tool_calling_results.sql_query:
SELECT TOP 100
    fis.SalesOrderNumber,
    fis.SalesOrderLineNumber,
    fis.OrderDateKey,
    fis.ProductKey,
    fis.OrderQuantity,
    fis.UnitPrice,
    fis.SalesAmount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
ORDER BY fis.SalesOrderNumber, fis.SalesOrderLineNumber

tool_calling_results.query: Revenue trend for the last 4 quarters
tool_calling_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    d.CalendarYear,
    d.CalendarQuarter,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    SUM(fis.OrderQuantity) AS TotalUnits,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimDate d ON fis.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
WHERE d.CalendarYear = (SELECT MAX(CalendarYear) FROM dbo.DimDate) 
    OR d.CalendarYear = (SELECT MAX(CalendarYear) - 1 FROM dbo.DimDate)
GROUP BY d.CalendarYear, d.CalendarQuarter
ORDER BY d.CalendarYear DESC, d.CalendarQuarter DESC;

tool_calling_results.query: Show sales by product and region and include a chart
tool_calling_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    p.EnglishProductName AS Product,
    st.SalesTerritoryRegion AS Region,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    SUM(fis.OrderQuantity) AS TotalUnitsSold,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON fis.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimSalesTerritory st ON fis.SalesTerritoryKey = st.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY p.EnglishProductName, st.SalesTerritoryRegion
ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC;

tool_calling_results.query: Which products have no sales?
tool_calling_results.sql_query:
SELECT 
    p.ProductKey,
    p.EnglishProductName
FROM 
    dbo.DimProduct p
LEFT JOIN 
    dbo.FactInternetSales fis ON p.ProductKey = fis.ProductKey
LEFT JOIN 
    dbo.FactResellerSales frs ON p.ProductKey = frs.ProductKey
WHERE 
    fis.ProductKey IS NULL AND frs.ProductKey IS NULL
ORDER BY 
    p.EnglishProductName;

tool_calling_results.query: Compare reseller vs internet sales by year
tool_calling_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    d.CalendarYear,
    'Reseller' AS SalesChannel,
    SUM(frs.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT frs.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount
FROM dbo.FactResellerSales frs
INNER JOIN dbo.DimDate d ON frs.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
GROUP BY d.CalendarYear

UNION ALL

SELECT
    d.CalendarYear,
    'Internet' AS SalesChannel,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalRevenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fis.SalesOrderNumber) AS OrderCount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimDate d ON fis.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
GROUP BY d.CalendarYear

ORDER BY CalendarYear, SalesChannel;

tool_calling_results.query: Show me the average discount for promotions
tool_calling_results.sql_query:
SELECT
    dp.EnglishPromotionName AS PromotionName,
    AVG(fis.DiscountAmount) AS AvgDiscount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimPromotion dp ON fis.PromotionKey = dp.PromotionKey
GROUP BY dp.EnglishPromotionName
ORDER BY AvgDiscount DESC
